calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-09-2008 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-27-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Thomas R. LeRoux appearing for petitioner Jeffrey Tung. Court is satified with the P/A in support of PC 8226. Court is admitting the earlier Will and revoking the prior Order admitting another Will. Bond is fixed in the amount of $387,000.00. Order signed. Counsel informed the Court that some of the heirs are in need of funds, he will petition for preliminary distribution. Court instructed counsel to take the necessary step to bring that to Court. Daniel Curzon appeared at the end of the proceeding and he informed the Court of his foreclosure problem. Court informed him that the petition before the Court is granted. It will be up to the attorney to take the necessary step to bring that to Court.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: A. Guitron.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-13-2007 Continued To Aug-27-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Thomas Leroux appearing for Jeffrey Tung.

The Court continued the matter to August 27, 2007 for briefing on the Probate Code Section 8226 issue.

Judicial Officer: Commissioner Dorothy L. McMath; Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722; Bailiff: Saephan; Clerks: R. Michael Diles and C. Joy Guandique.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-16-2007 Continued To Aug-13-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-25-2007 Continued To Jul-16-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Persons Entitled To Distribution, Whether Will Is Revoked By Dependent Relative Revocation, Validity Of Unsigned Trust As Sole Beneficiary, Validity Of Prior Will And Whether Prior Will And Codicil Should Be Admitted To Probate
Off Calendar May-14-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Thomas Leroux appearing for and with Dan Curzon, co-executor. Court finds the unsigned Trust is not a valid trust. Counsel is directed to explore submitting the Holographic Will for probate.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Gena Eales CSR# 9176. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Thompson.
